name: Cauliflower Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp garlic powder, or two minced cloves
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam cauliflower for 8 minutes or until tender. Drain.
2. Arrange the steamed cauliflower in a shallow casserole dish coated with cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine sour cream and the remaining ingredients (feta cheese, garlic powder, dill, salt, black pepper, bread crumbs, and paprika). Stir well to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Pour the mixture over the cauliflower in the casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle the bread crumbs and paprika evenly over the top of the cauliflower.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 375 degrees for 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
